summary: Verified Lite Mode + Quick Photos features end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 pytest pass — /api/violations/tree?level_iii=Y returns 346 leaves matching /api/violations/stats.level_iii_count=346 (full tree=1597); /api/violations?level_iii=Y items all have level_iii=Y; /api/violations/stats exposes level_iii_count; quick-photos -> annotated-photos JSON metadata attach works. Frontend: Login (042/1234), badge-display popover opens, lite-mode-toggle present and persistent (localStorage per badge). Toggling ON shows 'LITE' pill, swaps FilterBar -> LiteFilterBar (data-testid='lite-filter-bar'), reduces header nav to liteAllowed buttons {Level 3, HOS, Photos, Inspections, Resources}, relabels 'Steps' -> 'Level 3 Steps'. Toggling OFF restores full filter-bar and removes pill. Quick Photos page loads empty 'No photos yet'; file upload via choose-photo-btn renders photo-0; note editor (note-btn-0 -> note-editor-textarea -> note-editor-save) saves text; toggle-select-btn works; save-to-inspection-btn opens inspection-picker; new-inspection-btn expands an editor with new-insp-title input + create-and-save-btn that creates the inspection and navigates to /inspections/{id} with the photo attached under 'ADDITIONAL PHOTOS (1)'.
tests_executed: - TestViolationsTree::test_tree_full: full /api/violations/tree returns ~1597 entries grouped by class
- TestViolationsTree::test_tree_level_iii_filter: filtered tree count 346 < full 1597 and == stats.level_iii_count

- TestQuickPhotosToInspection::test_create_inspection_and_attach_photo_meta: POST /api/inspections (badge=042) -> 200, POST /api/inspections/{id}/annotated-photos JSON {photo_id,...} -> 200 device_only:true, GET reflects photo in general_photos
- Toggle ON: lite-badge appears, lite-filter-bar=1, filter-bar=0, header buttons reduced to ['Test Notes','042 LITE','Level 3','HOS','Photos','Inspections','Resources'], 'Level 3 Steps' relabel found
- Toggle OFF: lite-badge gone, full filter-bar restored
- File upload via hidden input behind choose-photo-btn -> photo-0 thumb rendered
- Note editor flow (note-btn-0 -> textarea -> note-editor-save) saved
- new-inspection-btn expands editor; create-and-save-btn creates inspection and navigates to /inspections/57a2fcfb-... with title TEST_QP_INSP_2026 and ADDITIONAL PHOTOS (1) shown
critical_code_review_comments: PASS (verified): /api/violations/tree honors level_iii=Y (server.py:587-593) — tree count drops 1597 -> 346 exactly matching stats.level_iii_count.
PASS (verified): /api/violations?level_iii=Y filters items at the Mongo query layer (server.py:488-489).
PASS (verified): LiteModeContext persists per badge to localStorage; Header.js renders LITE pill and filters nav by b.liteAllowed; Dashboard swaps to LiteFilterBar and forces level_iii filter.
PASS (verified): QuickPhotos gallery flow (snap many -> review grid -> save batch to NEW inspection) works end-to-end and the inspection page reflects the attached photo under ADDITIONAL PHOTOS (1).

MINOR (test-spec wording): The review_request lists 'data-testid=new-inspection-btn creates a new inspection'. In code, new-inspection-btn merely expands the title editor; the actual creation is on data-testid='create-and-save-btn'. Behavior is correct (avoids untitled inspections); main agent may want to clarify the spec wording.
MINOR (carryover from iter 12, NOT re-tested this round): TieDownCalculator.js POST /api/inspections badge omission — out of scope for this review but still flagged.
action_items: (NONE-CRITICAL) All requested functionality works as designed. Optionally clarify the new-inspection-btn vs create-and-save-btn flow in the spec.
(CARRYOVER, not re-verified) Confirm TieDownCalculator badge fix from iteration 11 is still in place.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of requested flows verified via Playwright

test_credentials: Standard Badge 042 / PIN 1234 (used). Admin Badge 121 not needed for this review.
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway inspection 'TEST_quickphotos_inspection' via API (deleted in test teardown) and 'TEST_QP_INSP_2026' via UI (left in DB; safe to delete). One device-only photo metadata 'qp_test_photo_1' attached then removed in test cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login is 2-step (badge -> PIN). For Playwright, use page.press(Enter) on each input rather than clicking buttons (more reliable than .click on the gold Continue/Sign In button). Lite mode toggle is inside the badge popover (data-testid badge-display -> lite-mode-toggle). Use .locator().click() (NOT force=True) for Radix Popover triggers — force=True bypasses the pointer events Radix listens for. The Quick Photos new-inspection flow requires TWO clicks: new-inspection-btn (expands form) then create-and-save-btn (after typing title in new-insp-title). Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_lite_mode_and_quickphotos.py.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Both Lite Mode and Quick Photos features are implemented to spec and work end-to-end against the deployed preview environment.
